description: Style Note baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in brown with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this fabric and synthetic leather bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit. Product Details Brown bag with one main zipped compartment that has two inner zipped pockets One smaller compartment on the front with a press buttoned closure One insert pocket, one zipped pocket, pen holders and a mobile pouch on the front One flap with a buckle design and a press buttoned closure One long adjustable handle for carrying ease One pocket at the back with a velcro closure Two pockets on either sides with velcro closures Branding on the back Material and Care Fabric and synthetic leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 32 cm Width: 39 cm Depth: 12 cm
